snippet: The principal and/or their delegate are to ensure goods belonging to, or in the care of, the school are decommissioned and disposed of in a way that takes into account safety, security, sustainability as well as environmental and social factors. 6 Management of suppliers Chapter 6 of the OHS Purchasing Procedure on managing suppli... 8 Responsibilities of suppliers Chapter 8 of the OHS Purchasing Procedure outlining the resp... Chapter 7 of the OHS Purchasing Procedure on safe, secure and sustainable disposal of goods in schools Reviewed 29 June 2020
